title: Leaves Plus 🌳
description: Enhances Minecraft’s tree leaves with denser, more natural textures while keeping a true Vanilla+ style. Lightweight, FPS-friendly, and Compatible-friendly, immersive forests.
body:
![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Eed8hXKz/images/f8dc9138629f6f6c3ab594e13970265a6c6b9ff5.png)

Leaves Plus brings Minecraft’s trees to life with denser, more natural, and detailed leaves — all while keeping the classic Vanilla+ aesthetic you love. Every forest, jungle, and grove feels fuller, greener, and more immersive without hurting performance.

![1](https://i.imgur.com/Bn5Q0r1.png)

🌳 Improved leaf textures for all tree types

🌲 Denser and smoother foliage for a realistic look

🍂 Biome-based colors that blend naturally

⚡ Optimized for performance — lightweight and FPS-friendly

🧩 Works perfectly with OptiFine, Continuity, and Sodium

🎨 Vanilla+ design that pairs beautifully with other texture packs and shaders

![2](https://i.imgur.com/d9v5U0O.png)

Whether you’re exploring ancient jungles or building cozy cottages, Leaves Plus enhances your world’s atmosphere with vibrant, life-like trees that stay true to Minecraft’s original style.
It’s the perfect pack for builders, survival players, and screenshot creators who want more beauty without losing simplicity.

![3](https://i.imgur.com/0sdDoMn.png)

✅ Works with Minecraft 1.21.6+

🧩 Compatible with OptiFine, Sodium, Iris, and Continuity

💻 Designed to run smoothly on both low-end and high-end PCs

![4](https://i.imgur.com/GoquMmf.png)

For the best visuals:

+ Enable Connected Textures (OptiFine or Continuity)

+ Use Fancy Leaves in video settings

+ Pair with a light shader for beautiful lighting effects

![5](https://i.imgur.com/bkUWegA.png)
